title: Variables, Expressions, Equations, and Practical Formulas
description: Build reusable cost, distance, energy, and capacity formulas from stakeholder requirements. Learners cumulatively produce a formula-driven planning calculator through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define variables with units and domains rather than treating letters as unlabeled blanks.
Substitute values into expressions with grouping, units, and intermediate reasonableness checks.
Solve one-variable linear equations while preserving equality at every transformation.
